title: paphiopedilum × frankeanum
intro: Paphiopedilum × frankeanum, a hybrid orchid, is a cross between Paphiopedilum victoria-regina and Paphiopedilum victoria-regina var. insigne. The medicinal properties of Paphiopedilum × frankeanum are primarily attributed to its rhizome, which contains alkaloids with potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its use in traditional medicine for treating fever, inflammation, and skin conditions, as well as its potential in managing diabetes and cancer. In herbal preparations, the rhizome of Paphiopedilum × frankeanum is often used in the form of extracts, tinctures, or infusions, but its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and limited scientific research.
